title: [CODEREVIEW] lilygo_tdeck_keyboard driver incomplete for full UI
description: lichen/drivers/input/lilygo_tdeck_keyboard.c:8 - Poll only reads reg 0x03 and always emits INPUT_KEY_ENTER; no support for trackball deltas or full key matrix from 0x55 chip. Required for LVGL keypad. Review pass 2 of 3.
close_reason: Completed minimal driver UI fixes after 3 parallel explore codereview passes (correctness/security/edge)
